metric_caveats: This 14-record diagnosis-recall slice uses record_ids from data/fixtures/exect_s0_diagnosis_recall_regression_slice.json.
Diagnosis recall doubles model calls versus monolithic v4.2; latency is not comparable to single-pass runs.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields remain diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication; recall pass only adds diagnosis labels.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
